The '''''Nova Viper''''' was a sleek battle [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] owned by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Spurch Goa|Spurch "Warhog" Goa]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] he piloted ''Nova Viper'' from [[Level 88]] in the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to [[Docking Bay 86]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
